name: Wink
description: A wall of almond eyes blinking out of the dark — lids open and close to new degrees on every redraw, irises following.

code.style: --iris: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* one emitted lid height drives lens and iris together, so the eye squints as one */ --lid: @r(8, 36); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 13%; top: calc(50% - @var(--lid) * 1%); width: 74%; height: calc(@var(--lid) * 2%); background: var(--color1); border-radius: 50%; transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(50% - @var(--lid) * 0.55%); top: calc(50% - @var(--lid) * 0.55%); width: calc(@var(--lid) * 1.1%); height: calc(@var(--lid) * 1.1%); background: var(--iris); border-radius: 50%; transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
